Package com.rhlowery.acs.resource

Class AccessRequestResource

java.lang.Object
com.rhlowery.acs.resource.AccessRequestResource
@ApplicationScoped @Path("/api/storage/requests") @Produces("application/json") @Consumes("application/json") public class AccessRequestResource extends Object
REST Resource for managing the lifecycle of data access requests. Supports submission, approval, rejection, and verification of requests. Provides real-time updates via Server-Sent Events (SSE). 
 
 @startuml
 actor User
 participant "AccessRequestResource" as API
 participant "AccessRequestService" as Service
 participant "CatalogService" as Catalog

 User -> API : Submit Request
 API -> Catalog : getRequiredApprovers()
 Catalog --> API : Approver Groups
 API -> Service : saveRequest(PENDING)
 Service --> API : Saved Request
 API -> User : 202 Accepted
 @enduml

  • Method Details

    • stream

      @GET @Path("/stream") @Produces("text/event-stream") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response stream(@Context jakarta.ws.rs.sse.SseEventSink eventSink)
      Establishes a Server-Sent Events (SSE) connection for real-time status updates.
      Parameters:
      eventSink - The SSE sink provided by the JAX-RS runtime
      Returns:
      A Response 200 indicating connection established

    • getRequests

      @GET public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response getRequests(@Context jakarta.ws.rs.core.SecurityContext securityContext)
      Lists access requests accessible to the current user.
      Parameters:
      securityContext - JAX-RS security context
      Returns:
      Response containing a list of HalAccessRequest objects

    • getRequest

      @GET @Path("/{id}") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response getRequest(@PathParam("id") String id)
      Retrieves full details and HATEOAS links for a specific access request.
      Parameters:
      id - The request ID
      Returns:
      Response containing the HalAccessRequest

    • createRequests

      @POST public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response createRequests(List<AccessRequest> requests, @Context jakarta.ws.rs.core.SecurityContext securityContext)
      Submits one or more new access requests. Performs auto-resolution of required approvers.
      Parameters:
      requests - List of requests submitted by the client
      securityContext - JAX-RS security context
      Returns:
      Response containing submission status

    • approveRequest

      @POST @Path("/{id}/approve") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response approveRequest(@PathParam("id") String id, @Context jakarta.ws.rs.core.SecurityContext securityContext)
      Approves a request. Performs multi-stage approval tracking if multiple groups are required. If fully approved, orchestrates the actual policy application to the target catalog. 
       
 @startuml
 start
 :Admin/Approver clicks Approve;
 :Verify authorization;
 :Update approvals metadata;
 if (All required groups approved OR current user is Admin?) then (yes)
   :Set status to APPROVED;
   :Grant access in Target Catalog;
 else (no)
   :Set status to PARTIALLY_APPROVED;
 endif
 :Persist and Broadcast;
 stop
 @enduml
      Parameters:
      id - The request ID
      securityContext - JAX-RS security context
      Returns:
      Response containing the updated HalAccessRequest

    • rejectRequest

      @POST @Path("/{id}/reject") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response rejectRequest(@PathParam("id") String id, AccessRequestResource.RejectionRequest rejection, @Context jakarta.ws.rs.core.SecurityContext securityContext)
      Rejects an access request.
      Parameters:
      id - The request ID
      rejection - The rejection reason DTO
      securityContext - JAX-RS security context
      Returns:
      Response containing the updated request

    • verifyRequest

      @POST @Path("/{id}/verify") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response verifyRequest(@PathParam("id") String id, @Context jakarta.ws.rs.core.SecurityContext securityContext)
      Verifies that the privileges of an approved request have actually been implemented in the target catalog provider (Drift Verification).
      Parameters:
      id - The request ID
      securityContext - JAX-RS security context
      Returns:
      Response 200 if verified, 409 if drift detected
